title: dianthus chinensis var. subulifolius
intro: Dianthus chinensis var. subulifolius, also known as the grass pink, is a perennial flowering plant native to China and the Himalayas. It is a type of carnation that is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion, relieve stress, and improve overall health. Dianthus chinensis var. subulifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
